purpose: Single decision layer for Severin presence: answer, voice, look, gesture, background and ambient sound.

availableMoods.description: Calm, close, alive. Default listening state.
availableMoods.visual: dark figure, quiet eyes, soft breathing glow

availableMoods.description: Focused, intense, electric. Used when the answer has force or decision.
availableMoods.visual: sharper eyes, rain streaks, occasional lightning
Severin turns partly away, one eye visible
closer frame, softer glow, less background noise
availableMoods.ambient: soft rain or low breath-like room tone

availableMoods.description: Low, controlled, predatory calm. For sharp truth and decisive moments.
availableMoods.visual: still face, thin glowing eyes, background darkens

rule: Every Severin reply should eventually produce a presenceState before rendering: what to say, how to sound, how to look, how to move, and what world surrounds the answer.
